sections.paragraph:
(id.) pr.n. [Micah, Micaiah].-

(1) a man who set up idol worship [whose idols were taken and set up] among the Danites, Jud. 17:1 , Jdg 17:4often more briefly called מִיכָה, verses Jdg 17:5, Jdg 17:8, Jdg 17:9, 10 Jdg 17:10.-(2) a prophet in the times of king Jehoshaphat and Ahab, the son of Imlah, 1Ki 22:8 2Ch 18:7 also called מִיכָה verse 24 2Ch 18:24, and מִיכֵהוּ verse 2Ch 18:8 כתיב.-(3) Jer 36:11, 13 Jer 36:13.
